settings.heading: What's included in every session
settings.row_content: All sessions are open coaching — sprints, hurdles, jumps, throws, and gym-based conditioning are all available. Athletes train what's on the program that day. There are no discipline restrictions and no separate ticketing per event.

settings.heading: Pricing options
settings.row_content:
• Single Session — $15: Pay per session, no commitment.
  • Weekly Pass — $40: Unlimited sessions for the week.
  • Monthly Membership — $150: Unlimited sessions for the calendar month.
  • Term Membership — $300: Unlimited sessions for the full term.

All passes include access to every session run during your period.

settings.heading: How it works
settings.row_content: Select your preferred pass above and complete your registration. New athletes should first attend a free Come & Try session — register here. Check the Training Timetable for current session times before attending.

settings.heading: Location & schedule
settings.row_content:
Sessions run at two venues:

  • Willoughby Council Grounds — our home ground. Check the Field Status page before travelling as natural turf closures apply.
  • Sydney Olympic Park Athletic Centre (SOPAC) — world-class facility. Entry fees apply separately at SOPAC.

settings.heading: Safety & compliance
settings.row_content: All Maximum Effort Academy coaches hold current Working With Children Checks and are fully insured. We operate in accordance with Athletics NSW guidelines. WWCC numbers are displayed on our About Us page.
